query: WITH first_pv AS (SELECT properties.$session_id AS sid, argMin(properties.$pathname, timestamp) AS entry_path FROM events WHERE event = '$pageview' AND timestamp >= '2026-03-29' AND timestamp <= '2026-04-19' AND properties.$ip != '137.103.50.217' GROUP BY sid) SELECT entry_path, count() AS sessions FROM first_pv GROUP BY entry_path ORDER BY sessions DESC
